description_long: This is a rectangular, black stereo amplifier head, likely used for electric guitars or professional audio setups. The front face features a prominent Peavey logo, a mesh grille, and a detailed control panel with multiple knobs, switches, and indicator lights, as well as the model number '6505 MH'. The top and sides are covered in a textured, leather-like material with reinforced corners for durability. The rear panel displays various input/output ports, switches, and a metal plate with technical information, while the back is partially open, revealing internal components. The overall construction appears robust, designed for both portability and protection in urban or performance environments. The object is compact enough to be carried by one or two people and is typically placed atop a speaker cabinet.
description: A black, rectangular stereo amplifier head with a detailed front control panel, mesh grille, and visible brand logo. The sides and top are textured and reinforced, with multiple ports and controls on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Peavey logo, mesh grille, and a full array of control knobs, switches, and indicator lights.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, textured black surface with reinforced corners and no visible controls or features.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals various ports, switches, a metal information plate, and an open section exposing internal components.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain, textured black surface with reinforced corners.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, white Peavey logo centered on the front mesh grille.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Fine black mesh grille covering the front panel, with no visible geometric or decorative perforations.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A horizontal row of rotary knobs, toggle switches, and push buttons along the lower front panel, each labeled with white text and indicator lights above some controls.
